sentence: 99% people make same type of content on youtube
prompt: A vast crowd of yellow-skinned, large-eyed Simpsons-style characters, each holding a smartphone or camera, all simultaneously filming or livestreaming identical, generic content like 'unboxings' or 'reaction videos' with monotonous expressions. A large '99%' graphic is superimposed above the crowd, suggesting conformity. Simpsons Animation Style
